name: Seele
desc: A resident of the Underworld and the backbone of Wildfire. She goes by the alias "Babochka."\nShe has a frank personality, but there is a delicate and sensitive hidden side to her deep in her heart.

1.name: Extirpating Slash
1.desc: When dealing DMG to an enemy whose HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Dancing Butterfly
2.desc: The SPD Boost effect of Seele's Skill can stack up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s).

3.name: Dazzling Tumult
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Flitting Phantasm
4.desc: Seele regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy when she defeats an enemy.

5.name: Piercing Shards
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Shattering Shambles
6.desc: After attacking with Ultimate, Seele inflicts "Butterfly Flurry" on the attacked enemy target for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Enemies in "Butterfly Flurry" will additionally take 1 instance of Quantum <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Seele's Ultimate DMG every time they are attacked. If the target is defeated by the "Butterfly Flurry" state's <u>Additional DMG</u> triggered by other allies' attacks, Seele's Talent will not be triggered.\nWhen Seele is <u>knocked down</u>, the "Butterfly Flurry" inflicted on the enemies will be removed.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

110201.name: Thwack
110201.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Seele's ATK to one designated enemy.
110201.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

110202.name: Sheathed Blade
110202.desc: Increases Seele's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Seele's ATK to one designated enemy.
110202.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to one enemy and increases SPD.

110203.name: Butterfly Flurry
110203.desc: Seele enters the Amplification state and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to one designated enemy.
110203.simple_desc: Enters the <color=#f29e38ff>Amplification state</color> and deals massive Quantum DMG to one enemy.

110204.name: Resurgence
110204.desc: Enters the Amplification state upon defeating an enemy with Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, and receives an <u>extra turn</u>. While in the Amplification state, increases the DMG of Seele's attacks by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nEnemies defeated in the <u>extra turn</u> provided by "Resurgence" will not trigger another "Resurgence."
110204.simple_desc: When <color=#f29e38ff>defeating enemy targets</color> with Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, gains an <color=#f29e38ff><u>extra turn</u> and enters the Amplification state</color>. While in Amplification, increases the DMG dealt by this unit.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

110206.name: Attack
110206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110207.name: Phantom Illusion
110207.desc: After using her Technique, Seele gains Stealth for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). While Stealth is active, Seele cannot be detected by enemies. And when entering battle by attacking enemies, Seele will immediately enter the Amplification state.
110207.simple_desc: Enter <color=#f29e38ff>Stealth</color> mode. After attacking an enemy and entering battle, enters the <color=#f29e38ff>Amplification state</color>.

1.point_desc: When current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, reduces the chance of being attacked by enemies.
While Seele is in the Amplification state, her Quantum <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1.point_desc: After using a Basic ATK, advances Seele's next <u>action </u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

descs: When an attack target's HP falls below a certain percentage, Seele <color=#f29e38ff>automatically triggers 1 Skill attack</color> against them
After defeating an enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>increases this unit's DMG dealt. This effect can stack</color>

1.name: Extirpating Slash
1.desc: When dealing DMG to an enemy whose HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and ignores <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of target's DEF.

2.name: Dancing Butterfly
2.desc: The SPD Boost effect of Seele's Skill can stack up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s).

3.name: Dazzling Tumult
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Flitting Phantasm
4.desc: Seele regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy when she defeats an enemy.

5.name: Piercing Shards
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Shattering Shambles
6.desc: After attacking with Ultimate, Seele inflicts "Butterfly Flurry" on the target for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Enemy targets in "Butterfly Flurry" will additionally take 1 instance of <u>True DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Seele's Ultimate DMG after receiving an attack. When the target under the "Butterfly Flurry" state is defeated by any unit, Seele's Talent will also be triggered.\nWhen Seele is <u>knocked down</u>, the "Butterfly Flurry" inflicted on the enemies will be removed.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

1110201.name: Thwack
1110201.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Seele's ATK to one designated enemy.
1110201.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

1110202.name: Sheathed Blade
1110202.desc: Increases Seele's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Seele's ATK to one designated enemy.\nAfter an ally target attacks, if the attack target's current HP percentage is <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> or below, Seele will automatically use her Skill at that target 1 time. This Skill does not consume Skill Points or regenerate Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn and resets at the start of Seele's turn. If there are no valid targets to attack, she attacks the enemy target with the lowest HP percentage instead.
1110202.simple_desc: Deals massive Quantum DMG to one enemy and increases this unit's SPD. After an ally target attacks, if the attacked target's current HP percentage is less than or equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, Seele automatically uses her Skill against them 1 time.

1110203.name: Butterfly Flurry
1110203.desc: Seele enters the Amplification state and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to one designated enemy.
1110203.simple_desc: Enters the <color=#f29e38ff>Amplification state</color> and deals massive Quantum DMG to one enemy.

1110204.name: Resurgence
1110204.desc: Enters the Amplification state upon defeating an enemy with Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, and receives an <u>extra turn</u>. While in the Amplification state, increases the DMG dealt by Seele increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nEnemies defeated in the <u>extra turn</u> provided by "Resurgence" will not trigger another "Resurgence."
1110204.simple_desc: When <color=#f29e38ff>defeating enemy targets</color> with Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, gains an <color=#f29e38ff><u>extra turn</u> and enters the Amplification state</color>. While in Amplification, increases the DMG dealt by this unit.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

1110206.name: Attack
1110206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1110207.name: Phantom Illusion
1110207.desc: After using her Technique, Seele gains Stealth for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). While Stealth is active, Seele cannot be detected by enemies. And when entering combat by attacking enemies, Seele will immediately enter the Amplification state and deals Quantum DMG equal to Seele's Skill DMG multiplier to random enemy target 1 time. This DMG is a guaranteed CRIT Hit.
1110207.simple_desc: Enters the <color=#f29e38ff>Stealth</color> state. After attacking an enemy and entering combat, enters the <color=#f29e38ff>Amplification state</color> and deals massive Quantum DMG with a guaranteed CRIT Hit to one random target.

1.point_desc: When defeating an enemy target, increases this unit's DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
While Seele is in the Amplification state, her Quantum <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1.point_desc: After using a Basic ATK, advances Seele's next <u>action </u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.
